// Connect 4 for TMS9918 (P-LAB graphic card)
// 32x32-pixel pieces, 28x24 board - 1230 bytes
// By VERHILLE Arnaud, 2026
// Controls: 1-7 drop, R restart
// Enable P-LAB TMS9918 card first, then type 280R

0280: A9 04 A2 06 20 50 05 20 45 05 20 1F 04 A0 00 98

02A0: 85 0A 20 AE 04 20 30 05 20 45 05 C9 52 D0 03 4C
